# Distribution Bundles

## EQFIN Shock Calibrator Portable
- `eqfin-shock-calibrator-portable-2026-03-06.zip`

This ZIP contains:
- Python GUI source (`calibrator_gui.py`, `spx_ndx_data.py`)
- Browser UI (`index.html`, `data.js`)
- Cross-platform launchers (`.bat`, `.sh`, `.command`)
- Bootstrap launchers that create local `.venv` automatically

Use this bundle when moving the tool to another machine or opening directly in PyCharm.
